session.user:
Run the following commands and report results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report what happened.
1. ruff check src/erk/cli/activation.py tests/unit/cli/test_activation.py 2. ruff format --check src/erk/cli/activation.py tests/unit/cli/test_activation.py
session.assistant: I'll run both ruff commands and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/activation.py tests/unit/cli/test_activation.py
Check ruff linting for activation.py files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format --check src/erk/cli/activation.py tests/unit/cli/test_activation.py
Check ruff formatting for activation.py files

session.assistant:
ruff check passed: All checks passed!
ruff format passed: 2 files already formatted
